summary: Implemented Bezier curve web connections between scattered points. Extracted a generic Overlay interface from ConstellationLines and updated OverlayAttachment to use it. Created a tessellateBezier generator that computes flat line positions with separate perpendicular arc offset attributes (bell-curve weighted via sin(t*PI)) for shader-side bass modulation. Built the BezierCurveWeb system implementing the Overlay interface with proximity-based pair selection, configurable segments (4-6), low base opacity (0.1), and a uBassArcScale uniform that modulates arc curvature in real time. Added a dedicated vertex shader that applies arc offsets before the shared deformation pipeline, reusing the constellation fragment shader. Added quality tier fields (enableBezierWeb, maxBezierConnections, bezierSegments) with low=disabled, medium=800/4, high=2000/6. Wired BezierCurveWeb as the primary overlay replacing constellation lines on medium/high tiers. All 32 new tests pass, all 1458 total tests pass, build succeeds.
